title: Chrome Companies
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
The '''Chrome Companies''' of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ophuchi]] considered aiding [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A [[Galactic traders|Galactic trader]] named [[Aay Zavos]] represented the Companies in an audience with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Kayos]].

Eventually, it was decided to send the [[Bloodory's distillation]] to Ophuchi to gain their support. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was entrusted with 33 vials of the distillation and with the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] to take to that planet, but he and his companions were forced to evacuate their damaged (and hijacked) [[Imperial starship]] over [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]] en route.

The help of the Companies proved unnecessary after the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] were recruited to the side of the resistance by [[Annikin Starkiller]], and they destroyed the Imperial [[Death Star/Legends|space fortress]].

==Behind the scenes==
When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was paid by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in the [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|second draft]], he was given a small box of [[chrome bar]]s. He claimed it to be worth 7 or 8 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Consequently the "Chrome" in the Chrome Companies' name may have represented particularly valuable mineral wealth.
